pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 27, export_result.sh line 12, task.json line 17. Path is used to create and reference a Note document in the Nuxeo API.
Code analysis: setup_task.sh lines 14-16 creates this workspace, export_result.sh line 11 references it. This is the target workspace in Nuxeo where the PDF should be uploaded.
Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 63 checks for this filename via Nuxeo API, export_result.sh line 63 searches for this filename in title. This is the required name of the exported PDF document.

Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 21 defines this string, line 22 embeds it in the note HTML content as '<small>Ref-Verification-7734</small>'. export_result.sh line 10 defines it and line 92 checks if the binary content of the PDF contains this string.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on Nuxeo Platform, a real open-source enterprise content management system. All metadata values are verified: source note path is '/default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Q3-Board-Minutes' in the Projects workspace; target folder is '/default-domain/workspaces/Corporate-Records'; required PDF filename is 'Q3-Board-Minutes-Final.pdf'; verification string 'Ref-Verification-7734' is embedded in the note content and checked in the exported PDF. All data is synthetic, created by setup scripts with hardcoded values including date 'October 15, 2023' and attendees 'J. Doe, A. Smith, B. Jones'.
